name: Jinneng Science & Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Jinneng Science & Technology Co., Ltd. is an energy-focused industrial company, produces and distributes fine chemical and coal chemical products in China. The company offers coke, carbon black, silica dioxide, technical naphthalene, pitch, para cresol, sorbic acid, and potassium sorbate, as well as methanol and pure benzene. Its products are used in various industrial applications, including tire manufacturing, as well as iron, steel, pharmaceutical, and food production. The company also exports its products to Europe, North America, and Asia. Jinneng Science & Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 1998 and is based in Dezhou, China.
